systemOverview.executiveSummary: Markdown-first notebook with a thin sync layer over object storage, browser-resident editor, and a small set of edge-cached read APIs.
systemOverview.systemPurpose: Capture and retrieve personal notes across devices with offline-first behaviour.
systemOverview.architecturalApproach: Local-first PWA with CRDT-based sync to a serverless backend.

architecturePrinciples.name: Local-first
architecturePrinciples.description: Every read and write succeeds offline; sync is a background concern.
architecturePrinciples.rationale: Users expect zero-latency local operation; network is unreliable.

architecturePrinciples.name: Small surface
architecturePrinciples.description: Public APIs are small, versioned, and stable.
architecturePrinciples.rationale: Long-lived clients cannot churn on every backend change.

dataStores.name: IndexedDB (browser)
dataStores.purpose: Local note store and pending-sync queue

coreEntities.name: Note
coreEntities.description: Markdown document with id, title, body, timestamps.

dataArchitecture.dataFlow: Edits land in IndexedDB; background worker pushes deltas to R2 when online.

integrationArchitecture.apiDesign: REST + JSON over HTTPS; idempotent writes keyed by client-generated UUID.
integrationArchitecture.eventModel: Push notifications via WebPush for cross-device change signalling.

securityArchitecture.authenticationPattern: Passwordless email magic link with rotating signed token.
securityArchitecture.authorizationModel: User-scoped; all data is private to the authenticated user.
securityArchitecture.secretsManagement: Cloudflare Workers Secrets; no plaintext in code.
securityArchitecture.threatModel: STRIDE; primary concerns are token theft and replay.

deploymentArchitecture.cicd: GitHub Actions; preview deploys per PR.

operationalConcerns.healthChecks: Synthetic edge probe per region every 60 seconds.
operationalConcerns.logging: Structured JSON logs shipped to Logflare.
operationalConcerns.metrics: p50/p95 latency per Worker route; cache hit ratio per edge POP.
operationalConcerns.alerting: PagerDuty on probe failure or error rate > 1%.
operationalConcerns.disasterRecovery: Restore from R2 versioning; RPO 1 hour, RTO 4 hours.
